label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 12

extraction.one_line_summary: CARAPAS attacked from 32-rider breakaway on final climb, took stage while POGACAR attacked GC group but ROGLIC/MAS matched easily
tactical_patterns: BATISTELLA solo attack at 65km isolated by break's refusal to chase, revealing peloton-sized breaks kill initiative
BORA deployed FABRO as super-domestique on final climb specifically to pace KELDERMAN into top six GC
POGACAR's red jersey team depleted on final climb, forcing him to counterattack rather than control defensively
VINE struggled after winning two prior stages, suggesting recovery cost from breakaway wins accumulates within three stages

rider_signals.CARAPAS Richard: positive: Stage win suggests form returning after demotion within INEOS hierarchy; seized opportunity when VINE fatigued
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: positive: Jumped to 6th GC via dedicated team support on final climb; BORA committed resources specifically for his placement
rider_signals.VINE Jay: negative: Faded on final climb after two stage wins, indicating breakaway victories extract multi-day recovery toll
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: neutral: Attacked last kilometer but isolated without teammates; aggressive response masked defensive positioning throughout climb
rider_signals.POLANS Jan: positive: Recovered from struggling early on climb to finish 4th, jumped to 9th GC showing deeper resilience
